enabled.description: Enable routine learning and accepted routine delivery.

suggestion_cron.description: Low-frequency cron for learning routine candidates and asking about suggestions.

delivery_cron.description: Cron for checking accepted routines that are due. Keep at every minute for precise delivery.

max_suggestions_per_week.description: Maximum routine suggestions sent per chat over any rolling seven-day window.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence required before the extension asks about a routine.

default_chat_id.description: Optional Telegram chat id for suggestions and routines. When 0, uses the host Telegram chat id.

auto_accept_suggestions.description: Explicit opt-in: automatically create routine rules instead of asking first. Off by default.
